findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "capitolguide_prep" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Pre-flight readiness check. Run before any other tool. Verifies secrets, KV, DB connectivity, and KB version + freshness. Returns a structured readiness report.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "check_access" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: What access a visitor needs for a zone of the Capitol complex: (visitor_type × zone) → allowed?, credential, escort, lead time, required docs, security entrance…

labels.name: nearby
labels.description: Nearest restroom, exit, and food for a specific point — a room code (floor-specific, e.g. the exact nearest bathroom to SH-217), a building name, or GPS coordinates {lat, lon}. Returns specific named venues ranked by distance.

labels.name: prohibited_items
labels.description: What you cannot bring into an area of the Capitol complex (security screening). zone: 'capitol_cvc' (the Capitol + Visitor Center — strictest, no food/water), 'gallery' (House/Senate galleries — no phones/cameras), or 'office_building' (the 6 office buildings — food & drink allowed). Always returns

labels.name: plan_day
labels.description: Optimize a multi-meeting Hill day. Give a list of meetings (each a member name or room code, with an optional time like '10:30a'). Returns a sequenced itinerary: batched by chamber side to minimize cross-campus crossings, the route + minutes between each stop, the cross-campus window flagged, 'leave
